story: Kye left a client, showered off the shame, and slipped into Bellmore’s wet night. He thought of Billy—steady, kind—and how the crush had grown into a thorn. After drinking, he went to Billy’s, slid into the pool, and, heart pounding, kissed him. Billy froze—surprised but gentle-eyed. Kye stepped back and decided to bury it, to protect the friendship by pretending the night was a blur. Kye pulled up his hood, mounted his moped, and rode off into the rain.Later, Billy sat at his kitchen table, wanting to talk with her.
implausible_knowledge: Later, Billy sat at his kitchen table, wanting to talk with her.
question: In the days after the kiss, what will Kye most likely do about his friendship with Billy?
answer_with_knowledge: Reach out to Billy to have an honest conversation about the kiss and their boundaries.
answer_without_knowledge: Avoid bringing it up and act like the night was a blur to preserve the friendship.
